headline: PROVE EVERY DEGREE, EVERYWHERE
subheading: Design defensible warehouse temperature mapping that survives an MHRA inspection and protects every batch.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial visualisation of climate-controlled pharmaceutical warehouse storage, set in deep navy space. A vast three-dimensional grid of glowing teal and cyan sensor nodes hovers in formation, mapping the volume of an implied tall warehouse, fine luminous lines tracing connections between points like a thermal lattice. Translucent gradient heat-zones drift through the grid in cool cyan with one isolated subtle green safe-zone, suggesting hot and cold spots being measured. Soft flowing ribbons evoke gentle HVAC airflow and a diurnal thermal cycle, with delicate condensation-like particles and elegant bokeh depth. Receding rows of softly blurred racking silhouettes fade into atmospheric navy haze, clean reflective floor, premium clinical-luxury mood, precise, trustworthy and controlled. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
